g.text: Step 3: Link PDE to New Table

ul.li: PDE.present = false — no page table exists!
Directory 0x41-0x3FF: Empty (no tables) Memory Used: 4 KB (page directory only)
Directory 0x41-0x3FF: Empty (no tables) Memory Used: 4 KB + 4 KB = 8 KB

text.tspan: // Allocate a frame for the new page table
// Allocate a frame for the new page table

g.text: Sparse (3 regions) | 4 MB | 4 MB | 16 KB (256× savings)
Dense (64 regions) | 4 MB | 4 MB | 260 KB (16× savings)
Fully populated | 4 MB | 4 MB | 4 MB (no savings)

div.p: Key Insight: A process with code at 0x00400000, heap at 0x01000000, and stack at 0x7FFF0000 only touches 3 directory entries.

ul.li: On-demand: 4 KB + (3 × 4 KB) = 16 KB Real processes are typically 0.001% dense — multi-level tables win big.
